upi_failure.zero_liability: Full refund if reported within 3 days of fraud discovery
upi_failure.escalation: NPCI escalation if unresolved after T+5
upi_failure.process: File complaint → Get UTR → Bank investigates with NPCI → Reversal to source account

fraud_reporting.immediate_action: Call 1800-XXX-XXXX → Request card/account block → File FIR
fraud_reporting.zero_liability_window: Reported within 3 working days → Full refund
fraud_reporting.partial_liability: Reported 4-7 days → Up to ₹10,000 liability on customer
fraud_reporting.rbi_guideline: RBI Circular RBI/2017-18/15 — Customer Protection in Unauthorised Transactions

kyc_norms.re_kyc: Required every 2 years for high-risk customers, 10 years for low-risk

loan_foreclosure.noc: Issued within 7 working days of final payment
loan_foreclosure.cibil_update: Within 30 days of closure (as per CIC norms)

grievance_redressal.level1: Branch Manager — resolve within 10 working days
grievance_redressal.level2: Nodal Officer — resolve within 15 working days
grievance_redressal.level3: Banking Ombudsman (RBI) — if unresolved after 30 days

nri_banking.remittance: No limit on inward remittance; outward up to USD 1M/year under LRS
